name: codex-changeguard
description: Evidence-bound Codex update impact analysis, incident localization, and reversible recovery planning.

interface.shortDescription: Explain updates, localize incidents, and preview reversible recovery.
interface.longDescription: Codex ChangeGuard maps official Codex changes and issue evidence to redacted local facts, runs deterministic probes, and produces evidence-bound impact contracts and recovery previews.
interface.defaultPrompt: Analyze this Codex update or incident with ChangeGuard. Keep observed facts, issue candidates, model inferences, and safe recovery actions clearly separated.
